svg.title: node server.js vs npm run dev — deep comparison
svg.desc: A diagram showing the difference between running node server.js directly and npm run dev, covering what each does, when to use each, and which is standard for production vs development.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about running node server.js directly')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about npm run dev')
g.text: Run a script defined in package.json
• Whatever is in the file, executes
← npm run dev runs whatever value is here

svg.text: Where each lives in the project lifecycle

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the industry standard way to run Node.js apps in production vs development?')
g.text: Dev → npm run dev | Prod → node server.js (or npm start)
